item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For April 21, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, April 21, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Wild animal
  • Hint 2: Found in Africa
  • Hint 3: Has a notorious laugh

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Lion
  • Hippo
  • Wildebeest
  • Giraffe
  • Leopard
  • Zebra
  • Cheetah
  • Baboon
  • Jackal

Today’s Contexto Answer For April 21, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Hyena

A Hyena is a wild animal from Africa and Asia that looks like a dog, hunts in groups, and makes a sound similar to a human laugh.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on April 22.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced Reveal Footage Leaks Online
item.content:encoded:
Right after the Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced reveal showcase announcement, footage and screenshots from the trailer have leaked.

Just a few hours ago, Ubisoft revealed that the worst-kept secret in gaming, the Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Remake, will finally be revealed later this week. Now, it is doubling down on its reputation as the worst-kept secret, with details from the upcoming reveal event already surfacing online.

A user named @intercelluar on X (formerly Twitter) shared a short clip and several screenshots from the reveal trailer of Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced, as spotted on r/GamingLeaksAndRumours. The footage lasts 11 seconds and highlights various scenes leading up to a naval battle. This includes moments such as spotting an enemy ship, the crew operating the cannons, Edward steering the ship, and cannonballs being hurled between the opposing ships.

The footage and screenshots also reveal the high fidelity the Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Remake has achieved, with highly detailed character models, realistic textures, flashy explosions, and more showcased in the leaked trailer snippet. However, the leaked footage only shows cutscene events; we have yet to see any actual gameplay. The leaker also posted a screenshot that appears to show the reveal trailer is 1:08 seconds long. Interested readers can check out the leaked clip here.

In other news, Insider Gaming exclusively confirmed earlier this week that the Assassin’s Creed Black Flag remake will launch on July 9, 2026. Additionally, the Indonesian rating for the game confirms that players will receive new content. What are your thoughts on Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced’s reveal footage leaking ahead of the showcase? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about PlayStation’s requirement of age verification for certain online features. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.
